services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Six categories, one promise — beautiful and lasting results

stretch.name: Stretch ceilings
stretch.desc: Smooth, glossy or matte surface that fits any space.

suspended.name: Suspended ceilings
suspended.desc: Multi-level gypsum constructions with a modern look.

acoustic.name: Acoustic ceilings
acoustic.desc: Reduce noise and create a calm, cozy atmosphere.

lighting.name: Ceiling lighting
lighting.desc: Integrated LED solutions — soft light exactly where you need it.

modern.name: Modern ceilings
modern.desc: Minimalist design, refined details and clean lines.

custom.name: Custom solutions
custom.desc: Your vision — our craft. Every project is unique.

quality.d: Only certified materials from European manufacturers.

precise.d: Every project measured and built to the millimeter.

cozy.d: Solutions that match the atmosphere of your home.

fast.d: Most jobs done in 1–3 days, with no dust or chaos.

warranty.d: Up to 12 years on materials and installation.

experts.d: 10+ years and hundreds of happy clients.

clean.d: We tidy up after ourselves — you just enjoy the result.

individual.d: Each client and space gets a unique solution.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from first message to finished ceiling

steps.d: Send us a message or call — we reply the same day.
We discuss your wishes and show samples and materials.
We visit, measure and prepare a precise quote.
Quick, clean work at the time we agreed.
Handover, walkthrough and warranty — you enjoy the home.

items.q: How much does a new ceiling cost?
items.a: Prices start at 25 €/m². The exact cost depends on type, area and lighting. Use the calculator for an estimate.
Most apartments are done in 1–3 days. Larger projects are scheduled in advance.
Only certified PVC and fabric materials from European manufacturers (Germany, France).
Up to 12 years on the material and 5 years on the installation.
No. A damp cloth a couple of times a year is enough.
Yes — we design and install LED lights, spots and decorative lighting.
Stretch ceilings are installed without noise or dust. No need to move furniture.
Yes — curved shapes, photo print, multi-level designs. Tell us your idea.

reviews.title: Client reviews
reviews.subtitle: What clients say about our work

items.t: Amazing result! The ceiling looks exactly as we dreamed. Fast and clean work.
Professional team with great lighting suggestions. Highly recommend.
Fair price, precise work, friendly craftsmen. Our home looks brand new.
